channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [HUDCO] HUDCO Board approves ₹1.50 final dividend; Q4 & FY26 results out
item.description:
Housing & Urban Development Corporation Ltd (HUDCO) announced that its Board of Directors, in a meeting held on May 14, 2026, approved a final dividend of ₹1.50 per equity share (15% on face value of ₹10) for the Financial Year 2025-26. This dividend is contingent on shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. This final dividend supplements four interim dividends already paid for FY26, bringing the total dividend for the year to ₹6.05 per share. The Board also approved the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. For FY26, consolidated Net Profit after tax increased to ₹4,034.37 crore from ₹2,709.14 crore in FY25, while Total Income from Operations rose to ₹13,150.40 crore from ₹10,311.29 crore. Consolidated Basic EPS for FY26 stood at ₹20.15, up from ₹13.53 in FY25. Minor, clarificatory updates to accounting policy were also approved, with no material financial impact.

  • Board approved a final dividend of ₹1.50 per equity share for FY26.
  • This final dividend is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Audited financial results for Q4 and full FY26 were approved.
  • FY26 consolidated PAT increased to ₹4,034.37 crore from ₹2,709.14 crore.
  • FY26 consolidated Total Income from Operations rose to ₹13,150.40 crore.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Housing & Urban Development Corporation Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [APOLLOTYRE] Apollo Tyres: Lakshmi Puri Re-appointment as Independent Director
item.description:
Apollo Tyres Ltd is seeking shareholder approval at the upcoming AGM for the re-appointment of Ms. Lakshmi Puri as an Independent Director for a second term of 5 years, effective from October 29, 2026. The board has also approved the audited financial results for FY26 and recommended a final dividend of ₹2.50 per equity share. Additionally, M/s. BBS Associates has been appointed as the Cost Auditor for FY27.

  • Lakshmi Puri's re-appointment as Independent Director is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Final dividend of ₹2.50 per share recommended for FY26, in addition to the interim dividend of ₹3.50.
  • BBS Associates appointed as Cost Auditor for FY27, replacing N.P. Gopalakrishnan & Co.
  • Audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, were approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: APOLLO TYRES LTD. | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [DWARKESH] Dwarikesh Sugar Recommends ₹0.10 Dividend; AGM on Aug 6, 2026
item.description:
Dwarikesh Sugar Industries Ltd's board has recommended a dividend of ₹0.10 per equity share (10%) for FY 2025-26, subject to shareholder approval at the 32nd AGM. The AGM is scheduled for August 6, 2026, with a record date of July 30, 2026. The board also approved the appointment of M/s. Ramanath Iyer & Co. as Cost Auditors and M/s. S.S. Kothari Mehta & Company as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27. Additionally, Mr. Gautam R Morarka's reappointment as Executive Chairman for five years starting January 1, 2027, was approved, pending shareholder approval.

  • Dwarikesh Sugar recommends a dividend of ₹0.10 per share (10%) for FY 2025-26.
  • 32nd Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for August 6, 2026.
  • Record date for dividend eligibility is set for July 30, 2026.
  • M/s. Ramanath Iyer & Co. appointed as Cost Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • M/s. S.S. Kothari Mehta & Company appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DWARIKESH SUGAR INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [SSL] Share Samadhan Ltd: FY26 Audited Results Approved
item.description:
Share Samadhan Ltd. announced the approval of its audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors approved the standalone and consolidated financial results, along with the auditor's report with unmodified opinions. Additionally, the board approved the appointment of M/s Anuj Gupta and Associates as Secretarial Auditor for the financial year 2025-26 and noted the statement of deviation and variation in the use of IPO and Warrant issue proceeds. Net Profit for the period is ₹194.27 Lakhs.

  • Approved audited financial statements for FY26 with unmodified opinions.
  • Net Profit reported as ₹194.27 Lakhs for the period ended March 31, 2026.
  • Appointed M/s Anuj Gupta and Associates as Secretarial Auditor for FY26.
  • Noted deviations in the use of IPO and Warrant issue proceeds.
  • Total Equity and Liabilities stand at ₹4,095.87 Lakhs as of March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Share Samadhan Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [TATAMOTORS] Tata Motors PV Ltd: FY26 Revenue ₹335.6K Cr, Dividend ₹3/Share
item.description:
Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Ltd (TMPVL) reported FY26 revenues of ₹335.6K Cr, a decrease of 8.3% year-over-year. Q4 FY26 revenues were ₹105.4K Cr, up 7.2%. The Board recommended a final dividend of ₹3.00 per equity share. Consolidated Net Debt stood at ₹30.7K Cr. The 81st Annual General Meeting is scheduled for July 8, 2026, with dividend payment on or before July 14, 2026, if approved.

  • TMPVL's FY26 revenue reached ₹335.6K Cr, down 8.3% YoY.
  • Q4 FY26 revenue increased by 7.2% to ₹105.4K Cr.
  • Board recommends a final dividend of ₹3.00 per share.
  • Consolidated Net Debt at ₹30.7K Cr.
  • AGM scheduled for July 8, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TATA MOTORS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [CHEMCRUX] Chemcrux Recommends 10% Final Dividend
item.description:
Chemcrux Enterprises Ltd's Board of Directors recommended a final dividend of 10% (Re. 1/- per share) on equity shares of Rs. 10/- each for the financial year 2025-26, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. The board also approved the incorporation of a wholly-owned, non-profit subsidiary under Section 8 of the Companies Act, 2013, to fulfill CSR obligations.

  • Chemcrux recommends a final dividend of 10% (Re. 1/- per share).
  • Dividend is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Board approved incorporation of a wholly-owned, non-profit subsidiary.
  • Subsidiary will operate under Section 8 of the Companies Act, 2013.
  • The subsidiary is intended to fulfill CSR obligations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Chemcrux Enterprises Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [THREEMPAPE] Three M Paper Boards Resumes Operations at Chiplun Plant
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Three M Paper Boards Ltd. has announced the resumption of operations at its Chiplun Plant. The plant was temporarily shut down due to a breakdown of certain parts of the Alternator and the AVR (Automatic Voltage Regulator). The required repair and replacement work has been completed, and the plant has recommenced its activities effective today.

  • Chiplun Plant operations resume after repair work.
  • Temporary shutdown was due to Alternator and AVR breakdown.
  • Repair and replacement work is now complete.
  • Plant activities have recommenced effective today.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Three M Paper Boards Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [AJWAFUN] Ajwa Fun World: Promoter Reclassification Application Submitted
item.description:
Ajwa Fun World & Resort Ltd. has submitted an application to BSE Limited seeking approval for the reclassification of certain shareholders from the 'Promoter/Promoter Group' category to the 'Public' category, as per Regulation 31A of the SEBI LODR 2015. The application follows an earlier board approval on April 18, 2026, regarding the reclassification request. The shareholders seeking reclassification include Nilesh K Jain, Manish M Jain, and Kamlesh K Jain.

  • Ajwa Fun World seeks BSE approval for promoter reclassification to public category.
  • Application submitted on May 14, 2026, under Regulation 31A of SEBI LODR 2015.
  • Shareholders seeking reclassification: Nilesh K Jain, Manish M Jain, Kamlesh K Jain.
  • Board approved the reclassification request on April 18, 2026, subject to exchange approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AJWA FUN WORLD & RESORT LTD. | Category: Promoter Reclassification

item.title: [AKUMS] Akums FY26: Revenue ₹4,359 Cr, PAT ₹276 Cr; Dividend Announced
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Akums Drugs & Pharmaceuticals Ltd. reported its Q4 and full-year FY26 results, showcasing healthy revenue and strong EBITDA growth. Q4 FY26 operating revenue reached ₹1,158 crore, a 9.7% YoY increase. Adj EBITDA stood at ₹152 crore, up 61.6% YoY, with margins improving to 13.1%. Adj PAT grew by 135% YoY to ₹83 crore. For the full year FY26, operating revenue was ₹4,359 crore, up 5.9% YoY, with Adj EBITDA increasing by 13.3% to ₹522 crore and Adj PAT growing by 27.3% to ₹276 crore. The board recommended a final dividend of ₹1 per equity share and a special dividend of ₹2 per equity share.

  • Q4 FY26 revenue grew 9.7% YoY to ₹1,158 crore; Adj EBITDA up 61.6% to ₹152 crore.
  • FY26 revenue increased 5.9% YoY to ₹4,359 crore; Adj EBITDA rose 13.3% to ₹522 crore.
  • CDMO segment was a key growth driver, with Q4 revenue at ₹952 crore and EBITDA up 54.9%.
  • Board recommends a final dividend of ₹1 per share and a special dividend of ₹2 per share.
  • Akums made its first commercial supply of formulations to Europe in FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Akums Drugs and Pharmaceuticals Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [VRAJ] Vraj Iron Board Meeting Outcome on May 14, 2026
item.description:
Vraj Iron And Steel Ltd's board meeting on May 14, 2026, approved the appointment of M/s. Sanat Joshi & Associates as Cost Auditors and M/s. Amit Kumar Agrawal & Co. as Internal Auditors for the financial year 2026-27. The approval of the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, was deferred to the next board meeting due to the unavailability of the audit report.

  • M/s. Sanat Joshi & Associates appointed as Cost Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • M/s. Amit Kumar Agrawal & Co. appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Approval of audited financial results for FY 2026 deferred to the next board meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vraj Iron And Steel Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
